creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Yaman from comment #0)

> I wanted to install Steam using linuxulator-steam-utils and in it's README, it says this about native wine-proton "only major.minor numbers have to match" and in Steam, there is Proton 9.0-4 which is one minor release newer than this port's version.

4 here is neither major nor minor version number, so I'm entirely self-consistent.

> I tried updating the port to 9.0.4 release but it got failed in build stage. Here is the my .diff file and build log.

I won't update the port and, from now on, I won't accept any updates either. Those incremental updates rarely (never?) bring any worthwhile changes yet they inevitably waste my time.
